
#### Day 1 Goals {.tabset}
<b>Overall goals for the first day are: </b>

<ol>
<li>Get comfortable navigating RStudio IDE, such as opening a new project or script, running code and viewing the output, etc.</li>
<li>Ability to import and save .csv and .xlsx files.</li>
<li>Basic understanding of variables, functions, and data frames.</li>
<li>Ability to explore data frame, such as dimensions (rows and columns), min/max of different columns, data type of column, basic plotting, etc.</li> 
<li>Basic understanding of square brackets to view and filter data[ , ]. </li>
<li>Exposure to NAs</li>
<li>Able to access help within and outside of R.</li>
</ol>
<br>
<b>Feedback: </b>Please leave feedback in the <a href="https://forms.office.com/g/vY0KbqxAXr">training feedback form</a>. You can submit feedback multiple times and don't need to answer every question. Responses are anonymous.

<img src = "./images/R_journey.png" alt = 'R journey' style = "display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;width:450px;">
<center style = "font-size:11px;font-family:'Arial',sans-serif;"><a href="https://allisonhorst.com">Artwork by @allison_horst</a></center>
</details>
<br>
